botConstructor.docsWelcome: ʻIke nā mea hoʻohana mua i ka wā e hoʻomaka ai lākou i ka bot me /start. Pono e loaʻa i kēlā me kēia bot.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Hoʻouna ʻakomi i kahi leka ma kahi papa manawa. Maikaʻi no nā hoʻomanaʻo i kēlā me kēia lā, nā hoʻolaha pule a i ʻole nā ​​​​hoʻolaha manawa.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Hoʻopili i ka logic bot. E nānā i kahi hoʻololi a i ʻole mea hoʻohana a pane ʻokoʻa ma muli o ka hopena.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Koho ʻo Bot i hoʻokahi pane mai ka papa inoa. Pono no nā ʻakaʻaka, ʻōlelo aʻoaʻo, aloha, a i ʻole nā ​​pane like ʻole.
botConstructor.docsApi: Hana i kahi noi HTTP i kahi API waho a hoʻohana i ka pane i ka memo bot. E hoʻohana i {data.field} e kuhikuhi i nā kahua pane.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Hoʻouna i kahi leka hoʻomaopopo i ka luna o ka lumi ke hoʻomaka ʻia. Maikaʻi no nā mākaʻikaʻi, nā leka hoʻohana hou, a i ʻole ka hoʻololi ʻana.

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Kuhi ʻōlelo
gravitixDocs.subtitle: He ʻōlelo kākau moʻolelo kiʻekiʻe no ke kūkulu ʻana i nā bots. 96 hiʻona. ʻO ke kua hope.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: ʻO Gravitix kahi ʻōlelo domain-specific (DSL) i hoʻolālā ʻia mai ka honua aʻe no ke kākau ʻana i nā bots Vortex. Ma kahi e makemake ai nā ʻōlelo ʻē aʻe i nā hale waihona puke, callbacks, a me ka boilerplate, hāʻawi ʻo Gravitix iā ʻoe i nā mea hoʻokele hanana papa mua, nā kahe kamaʻilio, a me ka mokuʻāina i kūkulu ʻia - nā mea āpau ma kahi syntax maʻemaʻe a hiki ke heluhelu ʻia i hoʻoulu ʻia e Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Hiki ke heluhelu — heluhelu ʻia ke code e like me ka manaʻo, ʻaʻole me ka mīkini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Palekana - hopu nā ʻano static i nā hewa ma mua o ka wā holo
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Hōʻike - hoʻokomo ʻia nā kahe, nā kiaʻi, a me ka hoʻohālikelike ʻana i ke ʻano
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Ka liʻiliʻi - ʻaʻohe papa, ʻaʻohe hoʻoilina, ʻaʻohe papa hana e aʻo ai
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: ʻO Gravitix no ka poʻe makemake e kūkulu wikiwiki i kahi bot Vortex - inā ʻaʻole ʻoe i kākau i nā code ma mua, a i ʻole he mea hoʻomohala loea i luhi i ka Python boilerplate. Ke aʻo nei kēia ʻōlelo iā Gravitix mai nā kumu mua: ʻaʻohe pono o ka ʻike mua.
gravitixDocs.howToRead: Pehea e heluhelu ai i kēia kuhikuhi
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Hoʻokumu kēlā me kēia ʻāpana i nā mea mua. Inā he mea hou ʻoe i ka polokalamu, e heluhelu mai luna a lalo. Inā ʻike mua ʻoe i ka ʻōlelo ʻē aʻe, e hoʻohana i ka papa ʻike e lele pololei i kāu mea hoihoi.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: ʻO ke ala wikiwiki loa mai ka zero a i ka bot holo.
gravitixDocs.whatHappened: He aha ka mea i hana ʻia?
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — wehewehe i ka mea lawelawe e holo ana ke hoʻouna ka mea hoʻohana /start. emit "..." - hoʻouna i kahi leka i ka mea hoʻohana. {ctx.first_name} — hoʻopili i ka inoa mua o ka mea hoʻohana i ke kaula.
gravitixDocs.runningTheBot: Ke holo nei i ka bot
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Ma ka Gravitix IDE, e kaomi i ke pihi holo ma ka pahu luna. E hoʻokomo i kāu Vortex Bot Token ke koi ʻia. Hoʻomaka koke ka bot - ʻaʻohe hana kūkulu e pono ai.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Hoʻokumu ʻia kēlā me kēia papahana Gravitix mai ʻekolu mau poloka kūkulu kumu: nā mea lawelawe, nā ʻōlelo emit, a me nā loina.
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterOn: Ka mea e hele ana ma hope
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterEmit: ʻO ka mea e hele ma hope o ka emit
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Nui nā mea hoʻohana no ka hoʻoheheʻe like
gravitixDocs.variablesAndTypes: Nā ʻano like ʻole a me nā ʻano
gravitixDocs.declaringVariables: Ka haʻi ʻana i nā mea hoʻololi
gravitixDocs.declaringDesc: E hoʻohana i ka huaʻōlelo let.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: He ʻano ko kēlā me kēia waiwai ma Gravitix. Paʻa ka ʻōnaehana ʻano: nānā ʻia nā ʻano i ka manawa hōʻuluʻulu, ma mua o ka holo ʻana o kāu bot.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Hoʻohui nā mea hana i nā waiwai e hana i nā waiwai hou.
gravitixDocs.operatorPrecedence: Ka mua o ka mea hana
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: ʻO nā kaula ma Gravitix he kikokikona i hoʻopaʻa ʻia ʻo UTF-8. Kākoʻo lākou i ka interpolation waiwai a me kahi hui o nā hana i kūkulu ʻia.
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: Nā hana kaula ma o nā mea i kūkulu ʻia
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Hoʻohālikelike-hoʻohālikelike i kahi waiwai me nā mamana he nui. E noʻonoʻo iā ia he ʻōlelo hoʻololi ikaika.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: ʻO nā hana he mau poloka code i hoʻohana hou ʻia. Kōkua lākou iā ʻoe e pale i ka hana hou ʻana a e maʻalahi ka hoʻomaopopo ʻana i ke code.
gravitixDocs.declaringFunction: Ka haʻi ʻana i kahi hana
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: ʻO nā mea lima ka puʻuwai o kahi bot Gravitix. Hoʻolohe kēlā me kēia mea lawelawe i kahi ʻano hanana kūikawā a holo i ka wā e kū ai kēlā hanana.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: ʻAe nā kiaʻi iā ʻoe e hoʻohui i kahi kūlana i kahi mea lawelawe. Holo wale ka mea lawelawe inā loiloi ke kiaʻi i ka ʻoiaʻiʻo.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Loaʻa ka mea ctx i loko o kēlā me kēia mea lawelawe. Loaʻa iā ia ka ʻike e pili ana i ka memo o kēia manawa a me ka mea hoʻohana nāna i hoʻouna.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: ʻAe ʻo State i kāu bot e hoʻomanaʻo i nā mea ma waena o nā memo. Me ka mokuʻāina ʻole, kūʻokoʻa kēlā me kēia memo a ʻaʻohe hoʻomanaʻo o ka bot.

gravitixDocs.listsInState: Nā papa inoa ma ka mokuʻāina
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Hāʻawi nā Flows iā ʻoe e kākau i nā kamaʻilio he nui i ke ʻano laina a hiki ke heluhelu ʻia. Hiki ke hoʻomaha a kali i ka memo a ka mea hoʻohana.

bestpractices.ct1: 🎓 E hoʻomau i ke aʻo ʻana
bestpractices.h1: 1. E mālama mau i nā mea i ʻike ʻole ʻia
bestpractices.h2: 2. E hōʻoia i ka hoʻokomo mea hoʻohana

bestpractices.p1: ʻO nā hiʻohiʻona a me nā maʻamau e ʻoi aku ka hilinaʻi o kāu mau bots Gravitix, hiki ke heluhelu ʻia a mālama ʻia.
bestpractices.p2: Pono e loaʻa i kēlā me kēia bot kahi mea hoʻokele hāʻule on msg i loaʻa mau i nā mea hoʻohana i ka pane:
bestpractices.p3: Mai noʻonoʻo pono i ka mea i hoʻouna ʻia e ka mea hoʻohana:
bestpractices.p4: E mālama pōkole i nā mea lawelawe. E hoʻoneʻe i ka loina paʻakikī i nā hana i kapa ʻia:
bestpractices.p6: ʻO ke ala maikaʻi loa e aʻo ai i ka Gravitix ʻo ke kūkulu ʻana. E hoʻomaka me ka simple echo bot, a laila hoʻohui i ka state, a laila hoʻohui i ka flows. ʻO kēlā me kēia manaʻo hou āu e aʻo ai e wehe i nā mea hiki.

complex_type.li5: Power: z**n hoʻohana i ke kumu hoʻohālike a De Moivre no ka huina helu n.
complex_type.p1: ʻO ka helu paʻakikī ke ʻano a + bi, kahi a ka ʻāpana maoli a ʻo b ka ʻāpana noʻonoʻo. ʻO i ka ʻāpana noʻonoʻo i wehewehe ʻia e i² = −1. Hoʻonui nā helu paʻakikī i ka laina ʻoiaʻiʻo i kahi mokulele, e ʻae ana i nā hāʻina i nā hoohalike e like me x² + 1 = 0 ʻaʻohe pane maoli.
complex_type.p2: Ma Gravitix ʻoe e kākau i nā huaʻōlelo noʻonoʻo me ka i suffix:
complex_type.p3: Hoʻohana pololei nā hana kumu ʻehā i nā waiwai paʻakikī. Gravitix hahai i nā lula helu helu maʻamau:
complex_type.p4: ʻO ka hana hōʻailona (ka nānā ʻana i ka leo, FFT), hana fractal (Mandelbrot set), ka hoʻohālikelike physics, ka helu ʻana i ka impedance uila, a me ka computing quantum e pono ai nā helu helu paʻakikī. ʻAe ʻo Gravitix iā ʻoe e holo i kēia mau helu i loko pono o kahi bot Vortex me ka ʻole o nā waihona waho.
complex_type.td12: Hoʻopaʻapaʻa (koki ma nā radians): atan2(b, a)
complex_type.td14: Mai ke ʻano polar: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td24: Hoʻonui ʻia nā hana trig i ka mokulele paʻakikī

error.cc1: hāʻule inā hoʻouna ka mea hoʻohana "hello"
error.ct1: ⚠️ I ka wā e hoʻohana ai try/catch
error.h3: Ke kiola ʻana i nā hewa me ka maopopo
error.p1: E kāʻei i kekahi code i hāʻule paha i loko o kahi poloka try. Inā he thrown ka hewa — ma ka Gravitix manawa holo a i ʻole ma kāu code — lele ka hoʻokō i ka poloka catch. Hoʻopili ʻia ka waiwai i hopu ʻia i ka mea hoʻololi āu i inoa ai ma hope o catch.
error.p2: Holo ka finally me ke kumu ʻole - inā ua kūleʻa ka try a i ʻole ka catch i hana hewa. E hoʻohana iā ia no ka hoʻokuʻu ʻana i nā kumuwaiwai, ka log, a i ʻole e hoʻouna i kahi memo hoʻopau.
error.p3: E hoʻohana i ka hoʻohana hewa ʻana no nā hana e hilinaʻi ana i ka hoʻokomo ʻana i waho: ka hoʻopau ʻana i nā kikokikona o ka mea hoʻohana, ke kāhea ʻana i nā API, ka heluhelu ʻana i nā ʻano hoʻololi kaiapuni, a i ʻole ka hana ʻana i ka makemakika paʻakikī kahi i hiki ai nā hewa domain (sqrt of negative, log of zero). No nā hewa loina kūloko, makemake i nā māhele guard a me nā return mua.

intro.h3: Pehea e heluhelu ai i kēia kuhikuhi
intro.li1: Heluhelu — heluhelu ʻia ke code e like me ka manaʻo, ʻaʻole nā mīkini.
intro.li2: Safe — nā ʻano static catch hewa ma mua o ka wā holo
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, and pattern matching is built-in
intro.li4: Minimal — ʻaʻohe papa, ʻaʻohe hoʻoilina, ʻaʻohe papa hana e aʻo ai.
intro.p1: ʻO Gravitix he ʻōlelo kikoʻī domain (DSL) i hoʻolālā ʻia mai ka honua aʻe no ke kākau ʻana i nā bots Vortex. Ma kahi o nā ʻōlelo ʻē aʻe e makemake ai i nā hale waihona puke, callbacks, a me ka boilerplate, Gravitix hāʻawi iā ʻoe i nā mea hoʻokele hanana papa mua, kamaʻilio flows, a me state i kūkulu ʻia - nā mea āpau i loko o kahi syntax maʻemaʻe a hiki ke heluhelu ʻia e Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix no ka mea makemake e kūkulu i ka Vortex bot me ka wikiwiki — inā ʻaʻole ʻoe i kākau i ke code ma mua, a i ʻole he mea hoʻomohala loea ʻoe i luhi i ka Python boilerplate. Ke aʻo nei kēia kuhikuhi i ka Gravitix mai nā loina mua: ʻaʻohe pono o ka ʻike mua.
intro.p3: Hoʻokumu kēlā me kēia ʻāpana i nā mea mua. Inā he mea hou ʻoe i ka polokalamu, e heluhelu mai luna a lalo. Inā ʻike mua ʻoe i ka ʻōlelo ʻē aʻe, e hoʻohana i ka papa ʻike e lele pololei i kāu mea hoihoi.
intro.p4: Ma kēia ʻōlelo a pau, ʻo → ʻo ia ka "e loiloi i" a i ʻole "hoʻopuka", a ʻo // ... hōʻike i nā manaʻo i mālama ʻole ʻia e ka mea hoʻopili.

math_calculus.cc1: He 2x ka hua o ka x²
math_calculus.cc10: ʻĀpana o ka hapalua pōʻai me ka radius 1: pono ʻo π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Waiwai i manaʻo ʻia: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx ma luna o ka puunaue maʻamau

math_special.p1: ʻO ka Gamma hana Γ(n) ʻo ia ka hoʻomau mau o ka factorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! no na huina kupono. Hoʻonui ia i ka factorial i nā helu maoli a paʻakikī.
math_special.p2: ʻO ka hana hewa erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt ka mea hoʻohui o ka Gaussian. Pili pololei ia i ka CDF maʻamau a ʻike ʻia ma nā hoʻohālikelike wela a me ke kumumanaʻo probability.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ no n=1,2,3,… (ke Re(s)>1). Hoʻopili i ka hāʻawi mua ʻana ma o ka huahana Euler. ʻO ka Riemann Hypothesis (ʻaʻole i hoʻoholo ʻia!) pili i nā zero o ζ i ka mokulele paʻakikī.
math_special.p4: ʻO nā hana Bessel Jₙ(x) a me Yₙ(x) he mau hoʻonā i ka hoʻohālikelike ʻokoʻa o Bessel: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Hōʻike ʻia lākou i ka hoʻolaha ʻana o ka nalu, ka hoʻoheheʻe ʻana i ka wela ma nā cylinders, a me ka mechanics quantum.
math_special.p5: ʻO Ai(x) a me Bi(x) nā haʻina no y'' = xy. Hōʻike ʻia lākou ma ka quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) a me optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Ke kū nei kēia mau ʻohana polynomial ma ke ʻano he eigenfunction o nā mea hana nui a hoʻohana ʻia i nā ʻano spectral, quadrature, a me quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: K(k) a me E(k) he mau huikau elliptic piha o ke ano mua a me ka lua. Hoʻopili lākou i ka manawa o kahi pendulum nonlinear a me ke anapuni o kahi ellipse.
math_special.td1: Γ(x) = ∫₀^∞ tˣ⁻¹e⁻ᵗdt. Hoʻopili ʻo Lanczos. Γ(n+1)=n!
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoids ʻoi akuflow no x nui.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): orthogonal ma [−1,1]. ʻO ka ʻāpana angular o nā hawewe hydrogen.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): orthogonal w.r.t. e^(−x²). Kuantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td7: Tₙ(x) = cos(n·acos(x)): ka hoʻohālikelike polynomial maikaʻi loa.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): orthogonal ma [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x). Nā hana hawewe radial hydrogen.

syntax.p2: Hoʻouna ʻo emit i memo i ka mea hoʻohana. Ma hope, kau ʻoe i ka ka waiwai e hoʻouna ai:

types.p1: He 64-bit pūlima pūlima. Kākoʻo i nā waiwai mai −9.2 × 10¹⁸ a i +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Hiki ʻole kekahi mau waiwai. ʻO nā kahua koho ma ctx (e like me ctx.username) he null paha. E nānā mau ma mua o ka hoʻohana ʻana:
types.p11: ʻO ka hoʻohui ʻana i ka ? ma hope o kahi ʻano e hōʻailona iā ia ma ke ʻano he koho — ʻo null paha ka waiwai. ʻO kēia ke ʻano o nā ʻāpana hana a me nā kahua state e hōʻike ai "ʻaʻole paha kēia":
types.p12: Inā ʻaʻole loaʻa kahi waiwai i nā manawa a pau, e kākau inoa iā T? a nānā mau i ka != null ma mua o ka hoʻohana ʻana. Ke komo ʻana i kahi kahua null ʻaʻole e hāʻule ka bot - ʻo returns null me ka leo leo.
types.p3: 10 / 3 me ʻelua int waiwai hāʻawi 3 (ʻoki ʻia). E hoʻohana i ka 10.0 / 3.0 no nā hopena decimal.
types.p4: Loaʻa i nā waiwai ʻelua: true a me false.
types.p5: He kaula kikokikona Unicode. ʻO nā kaula he mau waiwai hoʻololi ʻole.
types.p6: He kaʻina waiwai i kauoha ʻia, ʻo nā ʻano like a pau T.
types.p7: Ke komo ʻana i kahi index ma waho o ka laulā (e laʻa., nums[99] ke loaʻa i ka papa inoa he 5 mau mea) returns null ma mua o ka hāʻule ʻana i kāu bot.
types.p8: He hōʻiliʻili o nā hui waiwai kī. Pono ke ʻano o nā kī a pau, ʻo nā waiwai ke ʻano like.
types.p9: ʻO ke ʻano return ʻano hana ʻaʻole return kahi waiwai. ʻAʻole hiki iā ʻoe ke kākau i ka void me ka maopopo - ʻo ia ka mea paʻamau inā ʻaʻole i kuhikuhi ʻia ke ʻano return.
